message:
test(core): add comprehensive input path parity tests

Verify InputParser (raw byte parsing) and Event::from_crossterm()
produce consistent Event outputs for equivalent inputs.

31 tests covering:
- Basic key codes (Enter, Escape, Backspace, Tab, BackTab, Null)
- Arrow keys and navigation (Home, End, Insert, Delete, PageUp/Down)
- Modifiers (Ctrl, Alt, Shift, Super/Meta/Hyper)
- Mouse events (click, drag, scroll with modifiers)
- Kitty keyboard protocol (basic, modifiers, press/repeat/release)
- Focus and paste events
- SS3 sequences (alternate arrow key encoding)

Closes bd-1nz8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
